name: Caught Streaking (reupload)
description:
Suzy is addicted to the rush of streaking naked through her neighborhood at night. Unluckily for her, you were up when she got home!

Lots of first message options for having Suzy be your best friend, stepsis, stepdaughter, or a complete stranger. Hydrate and enjoy.

Original image here. Bonus images: 1 2 3 4 5 6 7

This is a reupload since the site mods saw fit to take the original down despite the avatar picture being non-explicit, within the image moderation rules, and in-line with other popular bots that did not get taken down. Idk though since they didn't give a reason this time. I wish they had standards.
creator: Story of Healing
